message:
chore(beads): add bd-b1f (stability policy for --json output) from in-flight planning pass

Follow-up beads sync flush capturing an additional issue opened right
after the previous sync: bd-b1f "Stability policy for --json output
(semver-style, no-remove in 0.x)". This is a docs task that pairs with
the reality-check bridge plan (NEXT_STEPS_PLAN.md) and formalises the
no-field-removal-in-0.x policy for the --json schema so consumers can
script against it safely.
